hero.title: Where Little Hands Shape the Future of Fashion
hero.subtitle: Every child's imagination, woven into sustainable threads. Every purchase, a step toward a fairer world.

featured.heading: Where Little Hands Shape Big Ideas
featured.body: Each campaign begins in a classroom, a community center, a shelter. We collect children's artwork — raw, honest, unfiltered — and transform it into sustainable fashion that funds their future.
featured.imageAlt: Children creating art in a community workshop
featured.caption: Spring Campaign 2026 — Artwork Collection Phase

cta.title: Join the Movement
cta.description: Whether you donate, shop, or share our story — every action counts.

hero.title: Our Story
hero.subtitle: A publication born from the belief that every child deserves to see their creativity change the world.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.body: Tonghua Public Welfare bridges the raw, unfiltered imagination of children with the world of sustainable fashion. We believe that the most honest art comes from the youngest hands — and that fashion can be a force for good when it carries those stories forward.

transparency.title: Radical Transparency
transparency.body: Every thread traced. Every donation accounted for. We publish our supply chain because you deserve to know.

childFirst.title: Child-First Design
childFirst.body: Children are collaborators, not subjects. Their consent, privacy, and creative ownership are non-negotiable.

sustainability.title: Genuine Sustainability
sustainability.body: No greenwashing. We measure carbon footprints, use certified materials, and publish our environmental impact quarterly.

community.title: Community Roots
community.body: We work with local schools, shelters, and community centers. Fashion is the medium; community is the message.

team.title: The People Behind the Pages
team.subtitle: A small team with an oversized purpose.

workshop.alt: Children painting in a VICOO community workshop
workshop.caption: A Saturday morning workshop in Chengdu, where children paint the dreams that will become our next collection.

supplies.alt: Organic cotton and natural dye materials used in VICOO production

quote.body: We don't just make clothes. We translate the unfiltered imagination of children into something you can wear — and in doing so, we fund the education that made that imagination possible.
quote.author: Chen Wei

hero.title: Campaigns
hero.subtitle: Each campaign is a chapter — a focused effort to connect children's art with sustainable fashion that funds real change.

quotes.text: Every brushstroke a child makes is a window into a world they imagine
We don't just sell clothes, we sell the right to know where it came from
Sustainability begins with seeing, not just buying
A classroom becomes a gallery when we open the doors
The ocean she painted was the bluest thing she had ever seen

mock.title: The Girl Who Drew the Ocean
mock.excerpt: Xiao Lin had never seen the sea. But her painting of it became the most popular design in our Spring collection.
mock.author: Chen Wei

mock.title: From Waste to Wearable
mock.excerpt: How our production team turns deadstock fabric into limited-edition pieces that fund art workshops.
mock.pullQuote: 3.2 tonnes of fabric diverted from landfill
mock.author: Zhang Hua

mock.title: A Classroom Becomes a Gallery
mock.excerpt: When Dongfeng Elementary opened its doors for our workshop, nobody expected the walls to become canvases.
mock.pullQuote: 120 artworks created in a single afternoon
mock.author: Li Mei

mock.title: Teaching Sustainability Through Art
mock.excerpt: Our new curriculum helps children understand environmental impact through creative expression.
mock.pullQuote: 14 schools adopted the curriculum this semester
mock.author: Wang Jun

mock.title: The Numbers Behind the Mission
mock.excerpt: A transparent look at how every yuan of donation translates into real-world impact for children and communities.
mock.pullQuote: 92% of funds go directly to programs
mock.author: Chen Wei

quoteBlock.quote: Every brushstroke a child makes is a window into a world they imagine. Our job is to make that world visible.
quoteBlock.author: Chen Wei

fallback.excerpt: A child's artwork, created with imagination and heart.

impact.artSuppliesDesc: Paints, brushes, canvases, and skilled workshop facilitators.
impact.productionDesc: Certified organic fabrics, fair-wage tailors, eco-dyes.
impact.operationsDesc: Website, payment processing, child safety systems.

transparency.title: Financial Transparency
transparency.subtitle: We publish quarterly financial reports. Every yuan is accounted for.
transparency.quarterly: Quarterly reports published every January, April, July, October
transparency.transparencyQuote: Transparency is not a feature. It is a responsibility.

cta.title: Every yuan tells a story. What will yours say?

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Your donation directly funds art supplies, workshops, and sustainable materials for children. We publish quarterly reports showing exactly how every yuan is spent.
faq.a2: Yes, you can choose to make your donation anonymous. Your privacy is important to us, and we respect your choice.
faq.a3: Yes, all donations to Tonghua Public Welfare are tax-deductible. You will receive an official receipt for your records.
faq.q4: How can I track my donation impact?
faq.a4: You will receive updates on how your donation is making a difference. We also publish quarterly financial reports showing the impact of all donations.

hero.title: Shop
hero.subtitle: Every garment carries a child's story. Every purchase funds the next chapter.

shop.empty: No products found in this category.

sustainability.certifiedMaterialsDesc: All fabrics are GOTS-certified organic cotton or recycled polyester. Every material is traced back to its source, with certificates verified by independent auditors before entering our supply chain.
sustainability.ethicalProductionDesc: Fair wages, safe conditions, full supply chain transparency.
sustainability.carbonMeasuredDesc: Every product's carbon footprint is calculated and offset.

workshop.imageAlt: Children creating artwork in a VICOO workshop
workshop.imageCaption: A Saturday morning workshop in Chengdu, where children paint the dreams that will become our next collection.

editorial.paragraph1: Every garment in this collection begins the same way — with a child, a blank page, and the freedom to imagine. We partner with schools and community centres across twelve cities, running workshops where children draw their hopes for the world.
editorial.paragraph2: Our designers then translate these raw, honest artworks into patterns, prints, and embroideries — never altering the child's original vision. The result is clothing that carries real stories, not manufactured ones.

hero.title: Traceability
hero.subtitle: From the child's hand that drew the design to the artisan who stitched it — follow every step of the journey.

lookup.title: Trace Your Product
lookup.subtitle: Enter an order number or product ID to follow its complete journey from creation to delivery.
lookup.placeholder: Enter order number or product ID...

carbon.title: Carbon Footprint Comparison
carbon.subtitle: Our commitment to sustainability means measuring, reducing, and offsetting every gram of emissions.
carbon.reductionDesc: Lower emissions through organic materials, consolidated shipping, and verified carbon offsets.
carbon.explanation: Based on lifecycle analysis comparing conventional fast-fashion production with our certified supply chain. Includes raw material sourcing, manufacturing, quality control, and last-mile delivery.

certifications.title: Certifications and Standards
certifications.subtitle: Every claim we make is backed by independent third-party verification.

cta.label: Shop with Confidence
cta.headline: Know what you wear. Trust what you buy.
cta.body: Every garment in our collection comes with a complete, verifiable supply chain record. No hidden steps, no unverified claims.

carbonTotal.offset: Offset through verified reforestation project in Yunnan Province.

quote.text: If you can trace it, you can trust it. Every stitch tells a story worth knowing.
quote.author: Supply Chain Manifesto

record.title: Record
record.desc: Every step in the supply chain is documented with photos, dates, locations, and partner verification.

verify.title: Verify
verify.desc: Third-party auditors verify each record. Unverified steps are flagged transparently.

publish.title: Publish
publish.desc: The complete journey is published on our platform for every customer to inspect.

gots.title: GOTS Certified
gots.desc: Global Organic Textile Standard verified organic fibers and responsible processing.

fairTrade.title: Fair Trade Verified
fairTrade.desc: Living wages, safe conditions, and ethical treatment for every worker.

carbonNeutral.title: Carbon Neutral
carbonNeutral.desc: Operations offset through verified reforestation and renewable energy.

childSafe.title: Child-Safe Production
childSafe.desc: Full compliance with child protection regulations and consent protocols.

example.title: Dreamscape Tee — Full Journey
example.subtitle: Follow the complete lifecycle of one product, from a child's brushstroke to your wardrobe.

0.description: Organic cotton sourced from certified farms in Xinjiang Province.
0.story: Our cotton comes from farms that prioritize soil health and water conservation.

1.description: Fabric weaving and quality testing at certified textile mill.
1.story: Each bolt of fabric is tested for durability and colorfastness before production.

2.description: Design digitized from a child's original painting of the ocean.
2.story: The original artwork was created by 8-year-old Xiao Lin during an Ocean Dreams workshop.

3.description: Cut and sew by fairly compensated artisans using eco-friendly dyes.
3.story: Our artisans earn living wages with full benefits in a safe working environment.

4.description: Final quality inspection and eco-packaging for shipment.
4.story: Every garment is individually inspected and packed in biodegradable materials.

5.description: Carbon-neutral delivery to customer door via green logistics partner.
5.story: All deliveries are carbon-offset through verified reforestation programs.

hero.title: Contact
hero.subtitle: We read every message. Whether you have a question, a partnership idea, or a story to share — we're listening.
hero.welcome: Whether you want to donate, collaborate, or just say hello — we'd love to hear from you.

items.question: How can I make a donation?
items.answer: You can donate through our secure online platform, WeChat Pay, or bank transfer. Every contribution directly supports children's art programs and sustainable fashion initiatives.

items.question: How do I submit my child's artwork?
items.answer: Visit our Campaigns page to find active art drives. You can upload artwork directly through our platform or send it to us via email. All submissions are reviewed within 3 business days.

items.question: How can I track my order?
items.answer: Once your order is confirmed, you will receive a tracking number via email. You can also check your order status anytime through your account dashboard under My Orders.

items.question: Are there volunteer opportunities?
items.answer: Yes. We welcome volunteers for workshops, event coordination, translation, and digital outreach. Send us a message with your interests and availability, and we will match you with the right opportunity.

items.question: How can my organization partner with you?
items.answer: We partner with schools, NGOs, and businesses that share our values. Select Partnership as your subject below and tell us about your organization. Our team will respond within 48 hours.

form.name: Your Name
form.subject: Subject
form.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
form.success: Thank you for reaching out. We'll get back to you within 24 hours.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

email.title: Email Us

responseTime.title: Response Time

traceability.mock.0.description: The original artwork was created in a safe, nurturing studio environment by our young artist.
traceability.mock.0.story: Every piece begins with a child's imagination. This artwork was painted during a guided creative session, with art educators helping bring the child's vision to life while respecting their unique perspective.
traceability.mock.1.description: Professional designers adapted the artwork for textile printing, preserving every brushstroke and color nuance.
traceability.mock.1.story: Our designers work closely with the original artwork, ensuring that the transition from canvas to fabric retains the emotional essence. Every color is matched, every line honored.
traceability.mock.2.description: Organic cotton sourced from certified sustainable farms, with full Fair Trade certification.
traceability.mock.2.story: We partner with farming cooperatives that prioritize soil health, fair wages, and water conservation. Each batch of cotton is traceable to a specific farm and harvest season.
traceability.mock.3.description: Garments produced in ethical factories with fair wages, safe conditions, and zero child labor.
traceability.mock.3.story: Our manufacturing partners undergo quarterly audits for working conditions, fair pay, and environmental compliance. Every worker is treated with dignity and paid a living wage.
traceability.mock.4.description: Each garment undergoes rigorous quality checks for safety, durability, and print fidelity.
traceability.mock.4.story: Quality assurance goes beyond aesthetics. We test for chemical safety, colorfastness, and structural integrity to ensure every product is safe for children and built to last.
traceability.mock.5.description: Carbon-neutral shipping with recyclable packaging and consolidated delivery routes.
traceability.mock.5.story: We minimize environmental impact through route optimization, recyclable packaging, and carbon offset programs. Your order arrives with the smallest possible footprint.
traceability.hero.title: Traceability
traceability.hero.subtitle: Follow every thread from canvas to closet. Our supply chain is an open book.
traceability.lookup.title: Product Lookup
traceability.lookup.subtitle: Enter a product ID or scan the QR code on your garment tag to trace its full journey.
traceability.example.title: Sample Journey
traceability.example.subtitle: A look at how one garment travels from a child's imagination to your wardrobe.
traceability.carbonTotal.offset: Fully offset through verified carbon credits
traceability.quote.text: Every stitch carries a story. When you know exactly where your clothes come from, you wear them differently — with intention, with pride, with gratitude.
traceability.quote.author: Lin Wei
traceability.carbon.title: Carbon Footprint
traceability.carbon.subtitle: Measuring our impact, one garment at a time.
traceability.carbon.explanation: Calculated using the GHG Protocol. Boundaries include raw material sourcing, production, packaging, and last-mile delivery.
traceability.carbon.reductionDesc: Compared to conventional fashion industry averages, our supply chain reduces carbon emissions by 75% through local sourcing, renewable energy, and optimized logistics.
traceability.howItWorks.title: How It Works
traceability.howItWorks.steps.record.des: Every stage of production is documented with timestamps, locations, and certifications — creating an immutable record from farm to fabric.
traceability.howItWorks.steps.verify.des: Third-party auditors validate each record. Certifications are cross-checked against international standards for organic, fair trade, and safety compliance.
traceability.howItWorks.steps.publish.de: Verified records are published to the blockchain and made accessible via the QR code on your garment tag — full transparency, always.
traceability.certifications.title: Certifications
traceability.certifications.subtitle: Verified by the world's leading sustainability standards.
traceability.certs.gots.title: GOTS Certified
traceability.certs.gots.desc: Global Organic Textile Standard — ensuring organic status from harvesting to labeling.
traceability.certs.fairTrade.title: Fair Trade
traceability.certs.fairTrade.desc: Certified fair wages, safe working conditions, and community development at every production stage.
traceability.certs.carbonNeutral.title: Carbon Neutral
traceability.certs.carbonNeutral.desc: Full carbon offset through verified reforestation and renewable energy projects.
traceability.certs.childSafe.title: Child Safe
traceability.certs.childSafe.desc: Independent audit confirming zero child labor and full compliance with children's rights protocols.
traceability.cta.label: Explore More
traceability.cta.headline: Transparency is not a feature — it's a promise.
traceability.cta.body: Every VICOO product comes with a complete supply chain story. Scan the QR code on your garment tag to begin.

donate.hero.subtitle: Every contribution powers a child's creative journey and builds a more sustainable future.
donate.emotional.quote: When a child's artwork becomes something you can wear, it becomes something you can carry forward — a piece of their world, stitched into yours.
donate.emotional.author: Chen Mei

donate.transparency.title: Transparency
donate.transparency.subtitle: Every yuan is tracked, every impact is measured.
donate.transparency.transparencyQuote: Transparency isn't just about showing where the money goes — it's about honoring the trust that every donor places in us.
donate.faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
donate.faq.a1: 60% goes directly to art supplies and creative programs for children. 20% supports sustainable production, 15% covers operational costs, and 5% funds community outreach.
donate.faq.a2: Yes. VICOO is registered as a public charity. All donations are tax-deductible to the extent allowed by law. You'll receive a receipt via email within 48 hours.
donate.faq.a3: Absolutely. Monthly donations help us plan long-term programs with confidence. You can set up recurring donations through our secure payment portal.
donate.faq.q4: How do I track my donation's impact?
donate.faq.a4: Every donor receives quarterly impact reports showing exactly how funds were used, which children were helped, and what campaigns were supported.
donate.cta.title: Make a Difference Today
